name: UmbracoDevContainer
postStartCommand: mkdir -p /workspace/.devcontainer/https && if [ ! -f /workspace/.devcontainer/https/devcontainer-https.pfx ]; then dotnet dev-certs https -ep /workspace/.devcontainer/https/devcontainer-https.pfx -p devcontainer-local-password; fi && az appconfig kv import --auth-mode anonymous --endpoint http://appconfig:8483 --source file --path ./infra/appconfig/appconfig.dev.json --format json --profile appconfig/kvset --yes
